title: const references to numbers should not be made
description: "const" references to numbers should not be madeAnalyze your codeintentionality-logicalreliabilityBugclumsyWhy is this an issue?There is no point in creating aconstreference to a literal numeric value. Most likely the intent was not to create a reference, but a constant value.Noncompliant code exampleconst int & weekdayCount = 7; // NoncompliantCompliant solutionconst int weekdayCount = 7;Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CIDeveloper EditionAvailable Since9.1©2025SonarSource Sàrl. All rights reserved.Privacy Policy|Cookie Policy|Terms of Use
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Avoid const references to literal values.
